creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

1. This doesn't give enough information for us to work with, 
the problem likely being internal enough to Arena to make 
it something which should be reported to the Arena maintainers 
anyway. 

2. Our web pages work with all standard browsers (and the ports 
collection also encapsulates Netscape, both 3.0 and 4.0, quite well). 
Arena is experimental and clearly marked as such.
